summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open maintainer-ready PRs. None have a complete merge preflight proving Codex /review, review-bot findings, and hydrated comments; #84584 and #84589 also have failing checks. #84636 is too large for automated finalization without review despite passing focused checks. #84708 and #84728 look closest to merge-ready by checks, but still lack required merge preflight proof.

actions.reason: Potentially useful focused PR, but failing checks plus missing required review/comment/Codex preflight make merge or automated repair unsafe from this artifact alone.

Small and likely repairable, but failing checks and missing required merge preflight proof prevent a merge recommendation; failure logs are not included, so a concrete fix artifact would be guesswork.
The PR may be valuable but is too broad for automated finalization without complete review evidence and maintainer acceptance of the new memory SDK surface.
This looks close to merge-ready on checks and scope, but merge policy requires resolved comments, resolved bot comments, and a clean Codex /review before recommending merge.
